src: Real life Kotlin Multiplatform project with an iOS application developed in Swift with SwiftUI, an Android application developed in Kotlin with Jetpack Compose and a backend in Kotlin hosted with CloudRun.
ja: iOS（Swift + SwiftUI）、Android（Kotlin + Jetpack Compose）、CloudRunホスティングのKotlinバックエンドを備えた、実際のKotlin Multiplatformプロジェクト
